== EntitySerializerRegistration.g.cs ==
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using Cvoya.Graph;
using Cvoya.Graph.Serialization;

internal static class EntitySerializerRegistration
{
    [System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ModuleInitializer]
    public static void Initialize()
    {
        EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance.Register<NullableCollections.TrackedNode>(new NullableCollections.Generated.TrackedNodeSerializer());
    }
}

== NullableCollections_TrackedNodeSerializer.g.cs ==
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
#pragma warning disable CS1591 // Missing XML comments for publicly visible type or members

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using Cvoya.Graph;
using Cvoya.Graph.Serialization;

namespace NullableCollections.Generated;

internal sealed class TrackedNodeSerializer : IEntitySerializer
{
    private readonly EntitySerializerRegistry _serializerRegistry = EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance;
    public Type EntityType => typeof(NullableCollections.TrackedNode);

    public object Deserialize(EntityInfo entity)
    {
        // Extracting init-only property 'Id'
        string idValue;
        // Look for property 'Id' in both simple and complex properties
        var idPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Id", out var idSimpleProp) ? idSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Id", out var idComplexProp) ? idComplexProp : null;
        // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
        idValue = idPropRep is null
            ? Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N")
            : idPropRep.Value is SimpleValue idPropRepSimpleValue
                ? (string)idPropRepSimpleValue.Object
                : Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N");

        var result = new NullableCollections.TrackedNode(
        )
        {
            Id = idValue
        };

        // Set remaining properties with setters
        // Look for property 'Scores' in both simple and complex properties
        var scoresPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Scores", out var scoresSimpleProp) ? scoresSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Scores", out var scoresComplexProp) ? scoresComplexProp : null;
        // Extract collection value
        result.Scores = scoresPropRep is null
            ? new System.Collections.Generic.List<int?>()
            : scoresPropRep.Value is SimpleCollection scoresPropRepSimpleCollection
                ? scoresPropRepSimpleCollection.Values
                    .Select(simpleValue => (int?)simpleValue.Object)
                    .ToList()
                : throw new InvalidOperationException("Required collection property 'Scores' is missing or null");
        // Look for property 'RelatedIds' in both simple and complex properties
        var relatedidsPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("RelatedIds", out var relatedidsSimpleProp) ? relatedidsSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("RelatedIds", out var relatedidsComplexProp) ? relatedidsComplexProp : null;
        // Extract collection value
        result.RelatedIds = relatedidsPropRep is null
            ? new System.Collections.Generic.List<System.Guid?>()
            : relatedidsPropRep.Value is SimpleCollection relatedidsPropRepSimpleCollection
                ? relatedidsPropRepSimpleCollection.Values
                    .Select(simpleValue => simpleValue.Object is null ? (System.Guid?)null : simpleValue.Object is System.Guid guidValue ? guidValue : System.Guid.Parse(simpleValue.Object.ToString()!))
                    .ToList()
                : throw new InvalidOperationException("Required collection property 'RelatedIds' is missing or null");
        // Look for property 'Labels' in both simple and complex properties
        var labelsPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Labels", out var labelsSimpleProp) ? labelsSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Labels", out var labelsComplexProp) ? labelsComplexProp : null;
        // Extract collection value
        result.Labels = labelsPropRep is null
            ? new System.Collections.Generic.List<string>()
            : labelsPropRep.Value is SimpleCollection labelsPropRepSimpleCollection
                ? labelsPropRepSimpleCollection.Values
                    .Where(simpleValue => simpleValue.Object is not null)
                    .Select(simpleValue => (string)simpleValue.Object)
                    .ToList()
                : throw new InvalidOperationException("Required collection property 'Labels' is missing or null");
        return result;
    }

    public EntityInfo Serialize(object obj)
    {
        var entity = (NullableCollections.TrackedNode)obj;
        var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();
        var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();

        // Serialize property: Scores
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(NullableCollections.TrackedNode).GetProperty("Scores")!;
            var value = entity.Scores;
            Serialized? serializedValue;

            serializedValue = value is null
                ? null
                : new SimpleCollection(
                    Values: value
                        .Select(item => new SimpleValue(item!, typeof(int?)))
                        .ToList(),
                    ElementType: typeof(int?)
                );

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Scores",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Scores"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: RelatedIds
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(NullableCollections.TrackedNode).GetProperty("RelatedIds")!;
            var value = entity.RelatedIds;
            Serialized? serializedValue;

            serializedValue = value is null
                ? null
                : new SimpleCollection(
                    Values: value
                        .Select(item => new SimpleValue(item!, typeof(System.Guid?)))
                        .ToList(),
                    ElementType: typeof(System.Guid?)
                );

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "RelatedIds",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["RelatedIds"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: Id
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(Cvoya.Graph.Node).GetProperty("Id")!;
            var value = entity.Id;
            Serialized? serializedValue;

            serializedValue = value is null
                ? null
                : new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Id",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Id"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: Labels
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(Cvoya.Graph.Node).GetProperty("Labels")!;
            var value = entity.Labels;
            Serialized? serializedValue;

            serializedValue = value is null
                ? null
                : new SimpleCollection(
                    Values: value
                        .Select(item => new SimpleValue(item!, typeof(string)))
                        .ToList(),
                    ElementType: typeof(string)
                );

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Labels",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Labels"] = propertyRep;
        }

        var actualLabels = entity.Labels?.ToList() ?? new List<string>();
        var primaryLabel = actualLabels.Count > 0 ? actualLabels[0] : "Tracked";
        return new EntityInfo(
            ActualType: typeof(NullableCollections.TrackedNode),
            Label: primaryLabel,
            ActualLabels: actualLabels,
            SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
            ComplexProperties: complexProperties
        );
    }

    [ThreadStatic]
    private static HashSet<Type>? _currentlyProcessing;
    private static readonly System.Collections.Concurrent.ConcurrentDictionary<Type, EntitySchema> _schemaCache = new();

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for TrackedNode.
    /// </summary>
    public EntitySchema GetSchema()
    {
        return TrackedNodeSerializer.GetSchemaStatic();
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for TrackedNode.
    /// </summary>
    public static EntitySchema GetSchemaStatic()
    {
        var typeKey = typeof(NullableCollections.TrackedNode);
        var currentlyProcessing = _currentlyProcessing ??= new HashSet<Type>();

        // Return cached schema if available
        if (_schemaCache.TryGetValue(typeKey, out var cachedSchema))
            return cachedSchema;

        // Check if we're already processing this type (circular reference)
        if (currentlyProcessing.Contains(typeKey))
        {
            // Return a schema without nested schemas to break the cycle
            return new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(NullableCollections.TrackedNode),
                Label: "Tracked",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>(),
                ComplexProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>()
            );
        }

        // Mark this type as being processed
        currentlyProcessing.Add(typeKey);

        try
        {
            // Build the actual schema
            var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
            var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
        // Schema for property: Labels
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(NullableCollections.TrackedNode).GetProperty("Labels")
                ?? typeof(Cvoya.Graph.INode).GetProperty("Labels")!;
            simpleProperties["Labels"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Labels",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.SimpleCollection,
                ElementType: typeof(string),
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: Id
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(NullableCollections.TrackedNode).GetProperty("Id")
                ?? typeof(Cvoya.Graph.IEntity).GetProperty("Id")!;
            simpleProperties["Id"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Id",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: Scores
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(NullableCollections.TrackedNode).GetProperty("Scores")!;
            simpleProperties["Scores"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Scores",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.SimpleCollection,
                ElementType: typeof(int?),
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: RelatedIds
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(NullableCollections.TrackedNode).GetProperty("RelatedIds")!;
            simpleProperties["RelatedIds"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "RelatedIds",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.SimpleCollection,
                ElementType: typeof(System.Guid?),
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }


            var schema = new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(NullableCollections.TrackedNode),
                Label: "Tracked",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
                ComplexProperties: complexProperties
            );

            // Cache the complete schema
            return _schemaCache.GetOrAdd(typeKey, schema);
        }
        finally
        {
            // Remove from processing set
            currentlyProcessing.Remove(typeKey);
        }
    }
}
